MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. PETE RYAN OF MBV LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. 781-4400 EXT. 1421 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. MATT MCFARLAND OF THE TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, TEL. NO. 771-9850 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT AND MOVING PARTY EDGAR DAVIS.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT EDGAR DAVIS JR'S MOTION FOR An Order Staying Of Enforcement Of Judgment Pending Appeal, STAY PENDING APPEAL GRANTED ON CONDITION THAT DEFENDANT PROMPTLY FILE A NOTICE OF APPEAL, PAY RENT ON A MONTHLY BASIS, WITHOUT CLAIMING THAT DOING SO AFFECTS PLAINTIFF'S RIGHTS IN THIS ACTION AND REFRAIN FROM DISTURBING PLAINTIFF'S PEACEFUL ENJOYMENT OF THEIR UNIT BY MAKING LOUD NOISES OR OTHERWISE HARASSING THEM.
